column3:
The highest-privilege user who manages the UniMove platform through the Admin Web Dashboard.
• View dashboard KPIs (orders, revenue, GMV, active customers, active providers).
• Manage users: view user profiles, suspend or activate accounts.
• Verify providers: review submitted documents, approve or reject provider registration, update verification status and notes.
• Manage orders: view order details, monitor order status across the platform.
• Handle disputes and complaints; process refunds according to platform refund rules.
• Moderate customer reviews and ratings.
• Manage platform settings, system notifications, and view activity logs / analytics reports.

A registered user with the role of customer (sinh viên), using the Customer Mobile App. This actor can request moving services and participate in the Pass đồ marketplace as a buyer and/or seller.
• Register, log in (email/password or Google), log out, forgot/reset password, and change password.
• View and update personal profile (full name, phone, student ID, university, avatar).
• Book moving services: select locations, recent places, combo packages, browse providers, insurance, pay deposit.
• Book labor-only or labor add-on services (khuân vác).
• View order history, track orders, cancel orders, chat with providers.
• Pass đồ as Seller: create listings, pay listing fee, manage listings, chat, confirm/cancel deals.
• Pass đồ as Buyer: browse listings, express interest, chat, wait for deal confirmation, book transport, confirm received, rate seller.
• View wallet, payment history, payment methods, promotions, notifications.

A registered user with the role of provider (nhà xe), using the Provider Mobile App.
• Register, submit verification documents, update business profile.
• Manage service packages and pricing; set availability and schedule.
• Receive, accept or decline order requests.
• Update order status; share location for tracking.
• View earnings, payouts, configure bank payout methods.
• Chat with customers; view notifications and reviews.
• Manage driver registration and provider profile.

An external payment gateway integrated with UniMove to handle financial transactions securely.
• Processes deposit payments for moving and labor orders.
• Processes listing fees for Pass đồ when required.
• Sends payment confirmation webhooks when transactions succeed or fail.
• Supports refund processing (cancellation, dispute resolution).

An external service for sign up / log in with Google accounts.
• Authenticates credentials when user chooses Continue with Google.
• Returns identity info so UniMove can create or link user profile.
